# Pre-Specified Time Ranges

**API Collection**

Constants that specify zero and invalid time ranges.

## Constants

- **zero**: A constant for generating an empty time range at zero.
- **invalid**: A constant for generating an invalid time range.

## Constants

- **Dictionary Keys**: Keys to use when working with dictionary representations of a time range.

items.description: A constant for generating an empty time range at zero.
items.name: zero

items.description: A constant for generating an invalid time range.
items.name: invalid

items.description: Keys to use when working with dictionary representations of a time range.
